message:
fix(wa-core): add span field to Detection and expand setup assertions

workflows.rs:
- Add span: (0, 0) field to all test Detection structs
- This field tracks the character range of the matched text

setup.rs:
- Expand WezTerm configuration block assertions
- Verify status update snippet is present
- Check for update-status, wa_last_status_update variables
- Verify WA_STATUS_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS configuration
- Check --from-status flag presence

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
